productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Hit & Chase Flops Red Slippers
description: Let your little one flip flop in pure comfort and joy in this pair of Tom and Jerry Hit and Chase flip flop from Warner Brothers. With a cushioned footbed and a grippy outsole, it makes for a safe pair of casual footwear. Upper Soft rubber straps with a toe separator Cushioned PU footbed with cartoon print Outsole Flexible and durable rubber outsole with ridges for absolute grip and traction Care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
